action.description: Use get-state to read state. Use set-autopilot-state with exactly one supported payload: landed OR airborne. Do not send null placeholders, mode, flightMode, target, or unsupported flight mode fields.

tensorfleet-project-path.description: Optional Tensorfleet project directory path for legacy .tensorfleet/.env fallback.

landed.description: Payload for action=set-autopilot-state when requesting the landed state. Include this OR airborne, never both. Produces autoState={kind:"landed",armed}.

armed.description: Desired arm state after landing. false disarms, true remains armed. Omitted defaults to false; do not send null.

airborne.description: Payload for action=set-autopilot-state when requesting the airborne state. Include this OR landed, never both. Produces autoState={kind:"airborne",altMeters,yawRad?}. Do not send mode, flightMode, kind, target, local position, velocity, raw local, raw attitude, AUTO, GUIDED, LOITER, MANUAL, TAKEOFF, LAND, or null placeholders.
